name: From Zero to Scale
description: Build a production-grade system from scratch, one architectural layer at a time.

encounters.draftHint: Traffic is growing. Users are hitting your database on every request. What will you add to handle the load?
Your user base is growing fast. A single server won't cut it. What do you need to scale horizontally?
You're going to production. Enterprise customers need SLAs and operational visibility. What will make your system reliable at scale?
